dashboard.subtitle: Prepare for the German citizenship test
dashboard.heroDescription: This app helps you prepare for the German citizenship test (Einbürgerungstest). Practice all 300 official questions, take simulated exams, and track your progress.
dashboard.step1Desc: Browse all 300 official questions by category
dashboard.step3Desc: Monitor your progress and review mistakes
dashboard.featureLearnDesc: Study all 300 official citizenship test questions with English translations
dashboard.featureExamDesc: Prepare for the real exam with simulated 30-question tests
dashboard.featureBookmarkDesc: Bookmark difficult questions and review them later

examPage.title: Exam Mode
examPage.subtitle: Simulate the real citizenship test
examPage.rule2: At least 20 correct answers to pass
examPage.rule4: You can skip any question and answer it later
examPage.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to submit the exam?

results.title: Exam Results
results.failMessage: You need at least 20 correct answers. Try again!

bookmarksPage.title: Bookmarks
bookmarksPage.subtitle: Your bookmarked questions
bookmarksPage.noBookmarksHint: Mark questions with the star icon while learning
